text: Welcome, Human! I Am Mako, A Web Character
Do Not Ask Why I Answer With Every Word Capitalized
I Do Not Know, Nor Does My Creator
Mako Tells Human To Press 'Z' Or Click The Dialogue Box
By Doing So, Human Can Ask Mako Anything, Unlike Weird [ass] Questions
Human Can Also Skip The Dialogues Animation By Pressing 'X'
Mako Encourages Human To Skip Dialogues
[Mako Does Not Get Paid Enough For Long [ass] Interactions]
Think Carefully Before Asking Me Anything
I Am Not A Regular Character
That Does Not Make A Difference At All
fallback: Mako stares at you with a neutral expression

text: Human, Our Time Together Is Over
Just, Do Not Bring Weird [ass] Questions
In Case You Wonder Why I Use Brackets To Wrap Certain Words
I Do Know, Just Do Not Want To Tell
